# Boise Fence Repair

> Boise's go-to fence repair & installation pros. Wood, vinyl & chain-link fence repair, post replacement & new installs. Free quotes. Serving Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Eagle.

Boise Fence Repair is a fence repair and installation contractor serving Boise, ID and surrounding areas: Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Eagle, Caldwell.
Rated 4.8 stars across 64 reviews. Phone: (208) 555-0149. Website: https://boisefencerepair.com

## Services
- Fence Repair
- Fence Post Replacement
- New Fence Installation
- Free Fence Quotes

## Service Area
Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Eagle, Caldwell

## Frequently Asked Questions
### How much does fence repair cost in Boise?
Common fence repairs in Boise range from $150 to $800 depending on damage and material. Leaning posts, broken rails, and storm damage are our most frequent fixes. Free quotes provided.

### Can you repair a wind-damaged fence?
Yes. Wind and storm damage are among the most common repairs we do across the Treasure Valley. We can usually inspect within 1 to 2 days.

### Do you repair wood, vinyl, and chain-link fences?
Yes, we repair and install wood, vinyl, and chain-link fencing for both homes and businesses.

### How soon can you come out for a fence repair?
We typically schedule fence repair estimates within a couple of days. Call (208) 555-0149 to book.

### Is it better to repair or replace a damaged fence?
If only a few panels, rails, or posts are damaged, repair is usually the most cost-effective option. If the fence is older, leaning in multiple sections, or has widespread rot, we may recommend replacement after inspecting it.

### How much does fence post replacement cost in Boise?
Fence post replacement in Boise often ranges from about $200 to $600 depending on how many posts failed, the fence material, and whether concrete footings need to be removed and reset.

### Do you offer new fence installation in Boise?
Yes. In addition to repairs, we install new wood, vinyl, and chain-link fences for homeowners and businesses in Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Eagle, and Caldwell.

## Contact
Call (208) 555-0149 for a free quote. Serving Boise and the surrounding region.
